subject: Fw: Little st Jeff. Master bathroom
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: "kellens@earthlink.net" <kellens@earthlink.net>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Friday, February 15, 2008 10:22:22 AM
Subject: Fw: Little st Jeff. Master bathroom



-----Original Message-----
From: "Pascal LAPARRA" <pascal.laparra@albertopinto.com>

Date: Fri, 15 Feb 2008 15:56:52 
To:<kellens@earthlink.net>
Subject: Little st Jeff. Master bathroom


Jeffrey, 
  
Please find enclosed the first proposal for your bathroom. Please send me your comments and let me know if you are ok with the layout and the size of the bathroom. If the size is good for you, I will do some more work on the design to do come up with something more amusing for you. As you can see your steam can easily be enlarged, if we use the corner space next to it and your shower can be more open to the outside if you wish. This is only a first draft to be discussed. 
  
Pascal
